  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and tone without altering content.",
    "RX.1": "Polishing should preserve appropriate expressions of uncertainty where warranted by the reported results.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the presented correlations support.",
    "RX.3": "Scope should remain limited to wording and style, not restructuring sections or changing claims or data.",
    "RX.4": "In a biological context, phrasing should not imply clinical relevance or robustness that could mislead stakeholders.",
    "RX.5": "All numerical results and qualifiers must be preserved so the polished text remains traceable to the original."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and tone without altering content.
rationale.RX.1: Polishing should preserve appropriate expressions of uncertainty where warranted by the reported results.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the presented correlations support.
rationale.RX.3: Scope should remain limited to wording and style, not restructuring sections or changing claims or data.
rationale.RX.4: In a biological context, phrasing should not imply clinical relevance or robustness that could mislead stakeholders.
rationale.RX.5: All numerical results and qualifiers must be preserved so the polished text remains traceable to the original.
